intro.title: llm.c
intro.desc: LLMs in simple, pure C/CUDA with no need for 245MB of PyTorch or 107MB of cPython. Current focus is on pretraining, in particular reproducing the [GPT-2](https://github.com/openai/gpt-2) and [GPT-3](https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.14165) miniseries, along with a parallel PyTorch reference implementation in [train_gpt2.py](train_gpt2.py). You'll recognize this file as a slightly tweaked [nanoGPT](https://github.com/karpath.
